question: How do I reset my password?
will i get certificate or not?
answer: yes we will get after completion of internship.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to Settings ? Security ? Reset Password. You will receive an email with a secure link valid for 24 hours.

title: can i get my certificate or not?
description: getting a certificate or not based on my performance ?
answer: yes , you can get a certificate after completion of internship and you can get a merit certificate also for your performance.

title: How to apply for summer internships?
description: I am a 2nd year student looking for internship opportunities at IIT Ropar. What is the process?
answer: Visit the T&P portal at iitr.ac.in for internship listings and apply through the official channel.
